name: Remi El-Ouazzane
background: Remi El-Ouazzane is President, Microcontrollers and Digital ICs Group, a position he has held since 2022. He is a member of ST’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining ST, El-Ouazzane was Chief Operating Officer of Intel’s Artificial Intelligence Products Group. He also served as CEO of Movidius before its acquisition by Intel.

company_affiliations.name: STMicroelectronics N.V.
